articles.author: AFP
articles.title: First Ebola Case Outside Africa in 2026 Outbreak Confirmed - ScienceAlert
articles.description: France on Wednesday announced the first confirmed case of Ebola identified on its territory, a doctor who had flown back from the Democratic Republic of Congo, which is fighting a major outbreak.
articles.content:
France on Wednesday announced the first confirmed case of Ebola identified on its territory, a doctor who had flown back from the Democratic Republic of Congo, which is fighting a major outbreak.
